description:
Deep antagonistic quality review of `hx-checkbox-group` (T1-10). 4/6 libraries ship this.

NOTE: This component arrived via `rescue/abandoned-components` (PR #175). Verify PR #175 is merged to dev before starting. Files at `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-checkbox-group/`.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, slotted hx-checkbox typing, group value (array) typing, form association via ElementInternals
2. Accessibility — `role="group"` with `aria-labelledby`, error/help text associated via `aria-describedby` on group, individual checkboxes still individually labeled, axe-core pass
3. Tests — multiple selection, form value (array), required validation (at least one), error/help text, disabled group vs individual
4. Storybook — various selection states, required, error, disabled variants
5. CSS — group layout (horizontal/vertical), `--hx-*` tokens, CSS parts
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB
7. Drupal — form-associated, Twig-renderable with slotted checkboxes

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-checkbox-group/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-checkbox-group — T1-10 antagonistic quality review
